query:
-- Check S1530 details
SELECT externalId, planName, provider, serviceType, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, customerExternalId
FROM services WHERE externalId = 'S1530';

-- Find all ABB services with $0 cost but have revenue (these are the ones missing cost)
SELECT externalId, planName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'ABB' AND monthlyCost = 0 AND monthlyRevenue > 0
ORDER BY monthlyRevenue DESC;

-- Also check all ABB services with $0 cost regardless of revenue
SELECT planName, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(monthlyRevenue) as totalRevenue
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'ABB' AND monthlyCost = 0
GROUP BY planName
ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC
LIMIT 30;
